international_shipping_policy: IMalidag izibophezele ekukhonzeni amakhasimende emhlabeni jikelele ngemikhumbi yamazwe ngamazwe ethembekile. Siyakubona ukubaluleka kokufinyeleleka kanye nokwenza lula, yingakho sakhe inethiwekhi yezokuthutha efinyelela kuwo wonke amazwekazi. Noma ngabe ukuphi, silwela ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ulwazi lwakho lokuthenga alunazihibe futhi lusebenza kahle. Izinsiza zethu zokuthumela ngemikhumbi zamazwe ngamazwe zidlulela eYurophu, e-Afrika, e-Asia, eMelika, nangale kwayo. Ngozakwethu abathenjwayo bokulethwa kwezidingo emhlabeni jikelele, siyakwazi ukuhlinzeka ngezinto zokuhamba ezifika ngesikhathi nezivikelekile zama-oda akho. Konke ukuthunyelwa kulawulwa ngokucophelela ukuze kugcinwe ikhwalithi yomkhiqizo futhi kuqinisekiswe ukwaneliseka kwamakhasimende. Kwa-Malidag, sibuka ukuthunyelwa kwamanye amazwe njengokungaphezu kwesevisi — kuyisithembiso. Isithembiso sokwenza imikhiqizo yethu itholakale emphakathini ohlukahlukene nokhulayo womhlaba. Noma ngabe ungumthengi wokuqala noma ikhasimende elibuyayo, ungalindela ubungcweti, ukwethembeka, nokunakekelwa okungaguquki kuwo wonke ama-oda esiwenzayo.
shipping_notice: Sibonisa imikhiqizo ethunyelwa endaweni yakho. Ungakhetha indawo ehlukile kumenyu engenhla.
learn_about_shipping: Funda mayelana nokuthunyelwa kwamanye amazwe lapha
login_to_add_to_basket: Sicela ungene ngemvume ukuze wengeze izinto kubhasikidi wakho.
basket_add_failed: Yehlulekile ukwengeza into kubhasikidi. Sicela uzame futhi.
basket_add_error: Kwenzeke iphutha ngenkathi wengeza into kubhasikidi wakho.
like_login_required: Sicela ungene ngemvume ukuze uthande izinto.
not_connected: 🚫 Awuxhunyiwe. Qiniseka ukuthi uxhumeke kunethiwekhi esekelwayo.
wallet_not_connected_warning: ⚠️ Isikhwama sakho semali asixhunyiwe. Sicela uxhume isikhwama sakho semali kuqala.
shipping_fee: Kwa-Malidag, sihlose ukunikeza izimali zokuthumela ezisobala nezincintisanayo ezenzelwe indawo yakho kanye nohlobo lwe-oda lakho. Izindleko zokuthumela zibalwa ngokuguqukayo ngesikhathi sokuphuma, kucatshangelwa izici ezifana nendawo okuyiwa kuyo, indlela yokuthumela, isisindo sento, nosayizi wokupakisha.  Sisebenzisana nezinkampani zenethiwekhi eziningi zamazwe ngamazwe ukuze sinikeze amanani atholakalayo angcono kakhulu kokubili okujwayelekile kanye nezinketho zokulethwa ezicacile. Phakathi nenqubo yokuphuma, uzokwazi ukubuka izindleko eziqondile zokuthumela ngaphambi kokuqeda ukuthenga kwakho - azikho izinkokhelo ezifihliwe noma izindleko ezingalindelekile.  Kuma-oda amakhulu noma lawo adlula umkhawulo wenani elithile, singase sinikeze amaphromoshini okuthunyelwa kwamahhala, azokhonjiswa ngokucacile ekuphumeni. Lokhu kunikezwa kungahluka ngendawo nesikhathi sonyaka.  Uma unemibuzo mayelana nezindleko zokuthumela noma ukufaneleka kokuthunyelwa kwamahhala, zizwe ukhululekile ukuxhumana nethimba lethu losekelo. Silapha ukuze sikusize wenze isinqumo esinolwazi kakhulu futhi esingabizi kakhulu ngezidingo zakho zokulethwa.

Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph1: Kwa-Malidag, siyaqonda ukuthi ukulethwa ngesikhathi kuyingxenye ebalulekile yokuthenga kwakho. Yingakho sisebenzisana eduze nezinkampani zenethiwekhi ezithenjwayo zamazwe ngamazwe ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ama-oda akho afika kuwe ngokuphephile nangempumelelo, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi ukuphi emhlabeni.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph2: Izikhathi zokulethwa ezilinganisiwe ziyahlukahluka ngokuya ngendawo oya kuyo, indlela yokuthumela ekhethwe ekuphumeni, nanoma yiziphi izinqubo ezisebenzayo zokugunyazwa kwentela. Nakuba silwela ukuhlangabezana nemigqa yesikhathi engezansi, ukubambezeleka ngezikhathi ezithile ngenxa yezinsizakalo zeposi zasendaweni noma imithetho yamazwe ngamazwe kungase kwenzeke.
standard: Ukuthumela Okujwayelekile: Ngokuvamile kulethwa phakathi kwezinsuku zebhizinisi ezingu-7 kuya kwezingu-21 , kuye ngendawo nezimo zesevisi yeposi.
express: I-Express Shipping: Ifika phakathi kwezinsuku ezi-3 kuya kweziyi-7 zebhizinisi ezindaweni eziningi zamazwe ngamazwe ngezinkampani zenethiwekhi ezikhokhelwayo.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph3: Uzothola inombolo yokulandelela ngokushesha nje lapho i-oda lakho lifika, ukuze ukwazi ukuqapha uhambo lwayo ngesikhathi sangempela. Uma iphakheji lakho libambezelekile ngale kwewindi elilinganiselwe, ithimba lethu losekelo lihlala litholakala ukuze lisize ukuxazulula inkinga ngokushesha.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph4: Sicela uqaphele ukuthi amaholide omphakathi, ukuhlolwa kwamasiko, noma izindawo zokulethwa ezikude zingase zengeze isikhathi esengeziwe. Sincoma ukukhetha ukuthunyelwa okusheshayo kwama-oda azwela isikhathi.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph1: Kwa-Malidag, sihlose ukunikeza izimali zokuthumela ezisobala nezincintisanayo ezifanelana nendawo yakho kanye nohlobo lwe-oda lakho. Izindleko zokuthumela zibalwa ngokuguqukayo ngesikhathi sokuphuma, kucatshangelwa izici ezifana nendawo okuyiwa kuyo, indlela yokuthumela, isisindo sento, nosayizi wokupakisha.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph2: Sisebenzisana nezinkampani zenethiwekhi eziningi zamazwe ngamazwe ukuze sinikeze amanani atholakalayo angcono kakhulu kokubili okujwayelekile kanye nezinketho zokulethwa ezicacile. Phakathi nenqubo yokuphuma, uzokwazi ukubuka izindleko eziqondile zokuthumela ngaphambi kokuqeda ukuthenga kwakho - azikho izinkokhelo ezifihliwe noma izindleko ezingalindelekile.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph3: Kuma-oda amakhulu noma lawo adlula umkhawulo wenani elithile, singase sinikeze amaphromoshini wokuthumela wamahhala , azokhonjiswa ngokucacile ekuphumeni. Lokhu okunikezwayo kungahluka ngendawo nesikhathi sonyaka.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph4: Uma unemibuzo mayelana nezindleko zokuthumela noma ukufaneleka kokuthunyelwa kwamahhala, zizwe ukhululekile ukuxhumana nethimba lethu losekelo. Silapha ukuze sikusize wenze isinqumo esinolwazi kakhulu futhi esingabizi kakhulu ngezidingo zakho zokulethwa.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph1: Sicela uqaphele ukuthi wonke ama-oda wamazwe ngamazwe angaba ngaphansi kwentela yempahla, izintela zokungenisa ezweni, nezinye izinkokhiso zokulawula ezibekwe uhulumeni wakho wendawo. Lezi zimali azifakiwe kumkhiqizo noma ezintengo zokuthumela eziboniswa ku-Malidag futhi zingaqoqwa yisiphathimandla sendawo yakini samasiko lapho kulethwa.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph2: Njengomamukeli, nguwe wedwa onesibopho sokuqinisekisa ukuthobela imithetho yezwe lakini yokungenisa nokukhokha noma yiziphi izinkokhelo ezisebenzayo. Sincoma ukuthi uhlole nehhovisi lezwe lakho langokwezifiso ukuze uthole imininingwane ethile ngaphambi kokufaka i-oda lakho.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph3: I-Malidag ayinasibopho sanoma yiziphi izinkokhiso ezengeziwe, ukubambezeleka kwempahla, noma ukwenqatshwa kwamaphakheji ngenxa yentela yokungenisa engakhokhelwa noma izinkinga ezihlobene nentela. Esimeni lapho kubuyiselwa khona iphakheji ngenxa yokungakhokhi noma ukungathobeli imithetho yangokwezifiso, noma yiziphi izinkokhelo zokubuyisela noma zokubuyisela isitoko zizodonswa ekubuyiselweni kwakho.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph4: Silwela ukwenza okuhlangenwe nakho kwakho kokuthenga kwamanye amazwe kushelele ngangokunokwenzeka futhi silapha ukuze sikusize nganoma yimiphi imibuzo ephathelene nemikhuba noma imibhalo. Sicela ungangabazi ukuxhumana nethimba lethu losekelo ngaphambi noma ngemuva kokuthenga kwakho.
language_change_body_1: Ngokushintsha ulimi, zonke izingxenye zohlelo lokusebenza ezifaka amagama emikhiqizo, izibuyekezo, nokuqukethwe kuzoboniswa ngolimi olukhethiwe.
language_change_body_2: Ulimi lwendabuko lwalolu hlelo lokusebenza isiNgisi.
language_change_body_3: Uma ungangenile, ukukhetha kwakho ngeke kukhunjulwe.
language_change_body_4: Sicela ungene ngemvume ukuze wenze isiqiniseko sokuthi okuncamelayo kolimi kugcinwa kuzo zonke izikhathi.
important_ reminder: Hlola imikhiqizo yethu ephezulu futhi uthenge ngemikhiqizo
